reopened.reason: EXPANSION — new defect scope. Prior fix (commit 96b5e3d) addressed graph_nodes/kb-graph isolation only. This scope targets the knowledge_entries KB query WHERE-clause leak across 5 sites + IsolationLayer, plus mem_search (LLM-critical) scope clause and analytics stats leak.

implementation.note: SM/dev-agent lacked tools in runtime; orchestrator implemented directly per user approval (option A), following dev-bug-diagnosis loop.

testing.note: 260/260 non-e2e logic tests pass incl. new SA4E31 isolation suite (9) + updated SA4E-26/27. LIVE multi-workspace verified: Sample kbEntries 1029->0, graphNodes 72170->0. Pre-existing: MigrationRunner version drift (7, unrelated), e2e auth 401 (environmental).
